case_title: PATELCO CREDIT UNION ATTN:ESTHER MAGSAYSAY-CARINO VS RICE, NINA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY PATELCO CREDIT UNION ATTN:ESTHER MAGSAYSAY-CARINO AS TO DEFENDANT RICE, NINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-16-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RICE, NINA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATELCO CREDIT UNION ATTN:ESTHER MAGSAYSAY-CARINO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RICE, NINA PLTF HAD FAILED TO SUSTAIN THEIR BURDEN AS TO DAMAGES. THEY HAD ALREADY "CHANGED OFF" THE DEBT AND HAD RECEIVED COLLATERAL BENEFIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
